title: Create an item automatically based on a template

posts.author: Lustig (Liran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m trying to build an automation that will produce a new item everytime a previous item has ended.
We have a team meeting every 2 weeks. Instead of creating this item manually, I want this item to be created once the current team meeting has ended.
I’ve tried to create an automation like this:

but that will only give me the option to create an item in a specific time:

image517×655 33.7 KB

I want the item to be scheduled in intervals of 2 weeks, and I can’t find a way doing that.

I hope I’ve made myself clear, and will really be glad if it can be done,

Thank you very much in advance

Liran

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Liran,

Is this along the lines of what you’re looking for?

This is using our every time period trigger…

Let me know if I’ve misunderstood!

posts.author: Lustig (Liran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca and thank you for your help,

As I’ve tried to explain, the problem is, that when I add the “START TIME” in the “then create an item”, I need to choose a specific time, and that is not good for me.
I need this trigger to create an event 2 weeks AFTER the date arrives.

Is this possible to do?
Or is there any app I need to add for that?

Thank you very much!

Liran

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ah, I see what you mean here - thank you for clarifying and apologies for my misunderstanding

I am afraid at this time, this isn’t natively possible - as you have come to realise. I am sorry for the setback!

As for available apps, we do have general caster and autoboost which are highly recommended apps that go beyond our standard functionality - that said, I can’t guarantee it will provide the specific functionality you’re looking for.
